title: Ultimate CPVP
description: This is the ultimate cpvp modpack.
body:
# ⚔️ Ultimate CPVP

> The ultimate Fabric modpack for Crystal PvP — optimised, responsive, and ready to fight.

---

## 🎯 What is Ultimate CPVP?

**Ultimate CPVP** is a carefully curated Fabric modpack built exclusively for **Crystal PvP** on Minecraft Java Edition. Every mod has been hand-picked to give you a competitive edge — better performance, cleaner visuals, and sharper gameplay feedback.

Whether you're just getting into crystal PvP or you're an experienced fighter looking for a polished setup, this modpack has you covered.

---

## ⚡ Why Ultimate CPVP?

### 🚀 Performance Optimised
Built with **Sodium**, **ImmediatelyFast**, **FerriteCore**, **Entity Culling**, and **More Culling** to maximise your FPS and minimise input lag — because in crystal PvP, every frame counts.

### 🎯 PvP Focused
Includes essential combat tools like **Marlow's Crystal Optimizer**, **BetterHurtCam**, **TotemCounter**, **Tier Tagger**, and **uku's Armor HUD** — everything tuned for a competitive crystal PvP experience.

### 🎨 Clean Visuals
Ships with **Bare Bones**, **BSL Shaders**, **Iris Shaders**, **Low Fire**, **Small Held Items**, and **Default Dark Mode** to keep your screen clean and readable mid-fight.

### 🧩 Plug and Play
Sensible defaults and a clean **Mod Menu** setup mean you can drop straight into a fight — no configuration headaches.

---

## 📦 Included Mods

| Category | Mods |
|---|---|
| **Performance** | Sodium, ImmediatelyFast, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, More Culling, Lithium, Remove Reloading Screen |
| **PvP & Combat** | Marlow's Crystal Optimizer, BetterHurtCam, TotemCounter, Tier Tagger, uku's Armor HUD, Low Fire, Small Held Items |
| **Visuals** | Bare Bones, BSL Shaders, Iris Shaders, Default Dark Mode, Default Dark Mode Expansion, Zoomify |
| **HUD & Info** | AppleSkin, Ping View, Fast IP Ping, BetterF3, Shulker Box Tooltip, Debugify |
| **QoL & UI** | Mod Menu, YACL, Cloth Config API, Controlling, Searchables, More Chat History, Chat Heads, Mouse Tweaks |
| **Utility** | Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, Text Placeholder API, Alacrity, Balm, ukulib |
